lowConfidenceReview.summary: Notes call for '4 x LP from showers/HWS outlets' but only 2 LP inspections available. Worker correctly allocated available slots to Legionella but budget shortfall exists.

Notes contain clear DS tokens ('x 3 LP and x 3 Micro', '1 x LP from each tank', '1 x Micro from each tank') but worker missed them. Manual review needed to determine if these could have been resolved.
Notes contain extensive DS schedule ('4 x Micro, 9 x LP', '1 x CWST in summer', '3 x Calorifier drains') but worker marked unresolved_no_notes. Manual review needed.
Visit has extensive notes about pool operations and multiple locations but worker marked all as unresolved_no_notes. May contain extractable patterns for some inspections.
